horoscope: With the Sun aligning with Neptune in your sign today, dear Aries, you're exuding a positive, upbeat, and pleasant aura, which endears you to others. You are more likely to have favors and wishes granted right now. Your more compassionate and idealistic nature comes strongly to the fore. The Sun highlights your dreams and ideals with its conjunction to Neptune, encouraging you to seek ways to connect with them. Otherwise, you might dream up something new that more accurately reflects your current needs and wants. If you've been neglecting your spiritual needs, this can be a time when you feel more longing and wish to do something about it. While apparent productivity may suffer a little as your mind wanders, you may very well make up for it through inspiration and imagination.

Today's energies are strong for your emotional world, dear Taurus. The Moon spends the day in your sign, highlighting your feelings and personal needs. Another strong influence is the Sun's meeting with Neptune in your privacy sector, signaling it's time to tie up some loose ends. You can have a better vision of your personal life today. This transit reminds you to tap into your intuition. Imaginative or creative activities are most attractive right now. You could be making a personal sacrifice or helping someone out. While practical matters may suffer a little, and you could be procrastinating, your imagination is in full bloom, taking you to fantastic places. Aim to connect with your dreams and spiritual heart and make extra time for yourself and for healing activities. Releasing resentment and embracing compassion, particularly regarding past matters that still have a hold on you, can be helpful now.

Getting some time to yourself can be helpful with the Moon in the sign behind yours all day, dear Gemini. The Moon is approaching full circle relative to your sign, and it's natural for you to need more time to reflect, meditate, and detox on an emotional level until the Moon enters Gemini tomorrow. With today's Sun-Neptune alignment, you're in good shape to better understand your needs. This transit awakens yearnings for kinship, friendship, and involvement on the soul level. This can be a day of illumination or illusion. You may be caring for others or seeking support, or you could become aware of the more confusing elements of your connections or a deceptive or inconsistent component of a relationship. Fortunately, it's also a time of big dreams for long-term happiness--you can be particularly interested in contributing to a worthy cause. It's possible your dreams need some reworking.

Today's Sun-Neptune alignment has an effect of illuminating your loftier goals, dear Cancer. It favors fantasy and creativity, but not necessarily attention to detail. If you crave some inspiration now, consider this a time for incorporating alternative or creative methods or elements into what you do. Spiritual longing, or aspects of your goals or career that fail to satisfy, could be magnified, as this transit spotlights areas where you may be ignoring your needs for a sense of a higher purpose, spirituality, and imagination. If so, then it's time to make a new plan to address these needs and desires. Today's energies make it relatively easy and quite enjoyable to plan or dream about your career or long-term goals. Making peace with the past helps you clarify your ambitions. You are not letting small problems get to you--you prefer to look at the bigger picture.

Today's good for connecting with others in happy ways, dear Leo. Your love of learning is in full swing, and you enjoy broadening your perspective. The yearly Sun-Neptune alignment occurs today and encourages extra fantasy and imagination, promoting the release of tension and resentment and the embrace of compassion. These will most likely come from learning new things or from finding inspiration in new experiences or perspectives. Publishing opportunities, trips, money ideas, or money itself can emerge in unusual ways. Venturing from your usual routine can lead to valuable insights and exciting adventures. You're unlikely to choose traditional ways to express yourself now. While it's important to be open to new feelings, try to keep your feet on your ground as you dream big.

The Sun forms its annual alignment with Neptune today, dear Virgo, illuminating your more idealistic yearnings and spiritual needs, particularly related to relationships. If you've been feeling a lack on an intimate level, this can also magnify. There may be questions about boundaries or confusion over shared resources that may require vigilance. If, instead, you're meeting your expectations, this can be a time of increased intimacy and connection that feels magical. Consider that if you're personally invested in something, it can be harder to see things clearly. There is a tendency to stretch beyond your reasonable limits, and while this can be good in moderation, pushing things too far is unlikely to pay off. Kept in check, this can be a fine time to connect with your dreams. You stand to learn a lot from observation today. Reflection can yield new insights into emotions and the past. At the same time, with today's Moon, you may be excited about trying out new theories or breaking new ground.

The Sun aligns with Neptune in your partnership sector today, dear Libra, and imagination or creative elements tend to dominate. This transit amplifies themes of dreams and creativity. You see things and people in a different light. It's best to watch for drawing in situations or people who drain your energy, as there's a tendency for others to misinterpret your words or actions in ways that suit their lives more than yours! The tricky part now will be setting boundaries. Yearnings for something more in your relationships can come on strongly if you've been feeling a lack in this area. However, this transit might instead bring on a magical connection with someone. You can lend someone support and comfort right now, which can brighten your day. It can also be a time when you recognize what's lacking in relationships. You may want to put a dream into action, particularly related to a partnership, or a plan needs some adjustments.

With the Sun and Neptune in alignment today, dear Scorpio, it's a great time to consider ways you might incorporate your spiritual or emotional needs into your daily routines. You might reconsider whether your habits, methods, and systems reflect or support a higher sense of purpose in your life. The humdrum doesn't appeal to you today, and a creative detour can serve to refresh and reinvigorate you. You could feel the urge to put your imagination into practical use. There can be a significant and possibly alternative idea, mind-body health method, or program emerging now. Helping others or performing a valuable service can be satisfying activities. Look for hidden trends and themes, particularly with your work or efforts to help and support others. Instead of wasting time aimlessly straying from your priorities, consider taking a measured break or a moment to refresh yourself.

The Sun aligns with Neptune today, dear Sagittarius, and this conjunction harmonizes with your sign, boosting your spirits. It's a potentially strong day for personal appeal and romantic endeavors. Excellent trends benefit you if you're doing some creating, sharing, or guiding. This transit magnifies your dreams. It can also amplify feelings of longing if you've neglected specific needs, which you suddenly see dramatically now! Nevertheless, it strongly influences romance, creativity, and imagination, and it can be a time of important realizations. There can be a feeling of serendipity, magic, or special kinship, or the motivation to find these things if you're feeling something's missing. The best way to handle Neptune aspects is to work on making your own happiness rather than turning to others to make it for you. This way, you're more likely to attract positive experiences your way.

You're in fine shape for special attention to your inner world today, dear Capricorn, although you're also interactive. You could find a special mission to address household problems or redesign something, however big or small, from the bottom up. There's warmth, openness, and willingness to make the most of a situation with you today. With the Sun and Neptune aligning in your solar fourth house, you could find that longings for better conditions in your personal life are stirred. It can also be an inspired time when you release negative or pent-up feelings and enjoy more compassion. It's an excellent day for making the extra time to rest or reflect, or at least acknowledge your need for more inspiration. In fact, living arrangements and conditions might be overdue for a boost or enhancement. You might uncover surprising feelings and desires — now is the time to get in touch with your spiritual heart.

Today's transits favor learning, sharing ideas, and special projects, dear Aquarius, and communications are a pleasant focus for you now. The Sun forms an alignment with Neptune in your sector of the mind, illuminating your need for mental engagement. It comes naturally to you to ease off a little from your personal agendas and plans to take time to understand the important people in your life. You may be seeking a stronger sense of purpose with or through what you're doing and learning. The technical side of things may not get as much attention as the creative components just for now. This transit encourages you to connect with your spiritual needs and dreams. You can be communicating in particularly creative or compassionate ways, and ideas for marketing or promotional strategies stand out as unique now. This transit comes as a gentle reminder to slow down and listen to your needs for a little more color, imagination, or whimsy in your life. While Neptune stirs creativity, it can also confuse or blur boundaries, and you should watch for potential miscommunications. With this influence in play, it's best to see where you might adjust your expectations and express yourself in new ways or through different channels.

The Moon's transit of your communications sector today tends to pick up the pace of your life, dear Pisces. Personal interests are plenty. Still, the Sun aligns with Neptune today, inspiring you to find creative ways to feel more grounded, secure, and steady. This transit highlights your dreams, fantasies, hopes, or ideals regarding money, stability, and comfort. It illuminates your dream for more ideal conditions and, depending on your current situation, possibly also areas of waste or disappointment. It can be an inspired time for creative business or practical ideas and interesting ideas that catch on. It makes sense to be more careful with spending and lending. You might consider whether your current projects, pursuits, and needs are in line with your spiritual needs and values, and if not, seek ways to make improvements. This transit is a tension diffuser, and as things slow down, you look at your life from a different perspective, questioning the things you automatically assume are priorities.
